phonetic: 藞l瑟tr蓹t蕛蓹(r); 藞l瑟t蓹r蓹t蕛蓹
phoneticUs: 藞l瑟t蓹r蓹t蕛蕣r; 藞l瑟tr蓹t蕛蓹r; 藞l瑟tr蓹t蕛蕣r
meaning: n.鏂囧(浣滃搧),鏂囪壓,钁椾綔,鏂囩尞
examples: He was passionate about all literature.
She has very eclectic tastes in literature.
As for the Literature Prize, only 12 Americans have won it in more than 100 years.
Literature is one of seven creative industry fields which UNESCO recognises through its Creative cities network.
